title: MYX: Place Limit Order + Edit
known_limitations: SGLT testnet pool may reject limit orders.

steps.description: Place limit buy at 50% of market price
steps.expression: (function(){var c=Engine.context.PerpsController;var p=c.providers.get('myx');if(!p)return JSON.stringify({error:'no provider'});return p.getMarketDataWithPrices().then(function(markets){if(!markets.length)return JSON.stringify({error:'no markets'});var m=markets[0];var price=parseFloat(m.price.replace(/[^0-9.]/g,''));var limitPrice=String(price*0.5);var size=String(150/price);return p.placeOrder({symbol:m.symbol,isBuy:true,orderType:'limit',size:size,leverage:2,usdAmount:'150',maxSlippageBps:500,currentPrice:price,price:limitPrice}).then(function(r){return JSON.stringify(r)})})})()
